tech_news.title: PlayStation Announces Project Playmo, Its Next-Generation PS5 DualSense Controller That Will Change How You Play Games Forever - IGN
tech_news.description: PlayStation has officially announced Project Playmo, its next-generation DualSense controller that can literally play games for you, act as an opponent in a fighting game to help improve your skills, and even order you a pizza with the power of AI.

tech_news.title: New Chrome Zero-Day CVE-2026-5281 Under Active Exploitation — Patch Released - The Hacker News
tech_news.description: Chrome patches 21 flaws including exploited CVE-2026-5281 in Dawn, marking fourth zero-day fixed in 2026, reducing active attack risk.
